comment: Flight search rules. The report enumerates every depart×return combo within max_nights and shows the cheapest. Prices themselves live in flights-latest.json (updated on demand / by an API script) so automated weather runs never overwrite them.

route.note: Michel flies from London; Dan from Belfast OR Dublin (DUB — bigger hub, often cheaper to Europe, ~2h from Belfast). Dan is local for NI venues. BFS=Intl, BHD=City.

data_source: Live Google Flights via SerpApi (scripts/fetch_flights.py), 1 search per combo/day. Key in SERPAPI_KEY (GitHub secret + local .env, never committed).
